subTitle: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

subTitle: Since Masao and Nene-chan are preoccupied, Kazama and Shin-chan start playing with each other. Later, Kazama suggests that they try wrestling.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: After Shin-chan decides to help others, he is met by a man who seeks directions to Kazama's house. However, Shin-chan annoys him.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: After Yoshinaga ends up losing her sandal, Shin-chan tries to play detective with his friends and discovers that it was stolen by a dog.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: The students of the kindergarten are trained by Yoshinaga in properly executing the evacuation process in the event of a fire or some other calamity.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: When Misae falls ill, Shin-chan tries to care for her and fills an ice bag with water. However, he leaves the tap running and causes the house to flood.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: After purchasing dog food for Shiro, Misae instructs Shin-chan to feed Shiro on time. However, Shin-chan forgets to do so.

title: Paap-O-Meter and The Space Bandits
subTitle: Kasukabe's new mayor, Eco Loco, transforms all residents into animals, urging a return to primal roots. The Nohara family adjusts to new forms, like Misae's cat and Hiroshi's rooster.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: When Hiroshi and Shin-chan need a haircut, they visit a salon but Shin-chan annoys the barber with his mischief and causes her to quit.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: After helping his mother Misae with a myriad of household chores, Shin-chan draws on her face with permanent ink when she falls asleep.
